channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: This unique tablet combines full Android power with a paper-like display and a pro-grade stylus
item.description: Cheap Android tablets usually pack a solid punch, but only when made by name brands. The Huion Kamvas Slate 11 is a clear exception to this rule.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Huion Kamvas Slate 11
media:content.media:text: Huion Kamvas Slate 11
media:content.media:title: Huion Kamvas Slate 11

item.title: iPhone 17e vs. Samsung Galaxy S25 FE: Simplicity or versatility?
item.description: The iPhone 17e is a basic smartphone focused on optimization and performance, while the higher-priced Galaxy S25 FE is all about versatility.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.

item.title: Here's how Google plans to 'balance' a safer Android with side-loading this year
item.description: Google will keep side-loading for Android, but not without an "advanced flow" that will bring "balance" to user safety and the OS' openness.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens

item.title: Horizon Worlds is officially dead on VR. What happens now for the Meta Quest (and the Metaverse)?
item.description: Meta is evolving once again, this time fully removing Horizon Worlds from the Meta Quest experience. Here's what that means for your everyday VR sessions.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset
media:content.media:text: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset
media:content.media:title: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset

item.title: I'd still choose this Lenovo Chromebook over the MacBook Neo — especially when it's $100 off at Best Buy
item.description: The Lenovo Chromebook Plus is our top recommended laptop for most people, and it just scored a $100 discount at Best Buy.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Analyzing video in Google Gemini on Lenovo Chromebook Plus 14
media:content.media:text: Analyzing video in Google Gemini on Lenovo Chromebook Plus 14
media:content.media:title: Analyzing video in Google Gemini on Lenovo Chromebook Plus 14

item.title: One-off, silly questions for Gemini might be easier to make if Google's tests are positive
item.description: Google might change up a convenient Gemini feature that many users probably weren't using enough.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 9a sitting on a fence, showing the Gemini prompt screen.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 9a sitting on a fence, showing the Gemini prompt screen.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 9a sitting on a fence, showing the Gemini prompt screen.

item.title: Galaxy Z TriFold might be dead, but a successor is already in the works
item.description: Samsung is reportedly working on a successor to the Galaxy Z TriFold alongside a new foldable concept.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central

item.title: WhatsApp, Garmin? Fenix, Forerunners users, and more can now chat away with their watches
item.description: Garmin taps WhatsApp, says the app will likely be the "first" and "only" of its kind for several select watches.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:text: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:title: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8

item.title: Google Labs’ Stitch is a design canvas that turns your voice into an app
item.description: Google’s Stitch lets you build app UIs from simple prompts, speeding up design fast, but it could also lead to generic, same-looking apps if everyone relies on AI too much.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Labs at Google IO 2023
media:content.media:text: Labs at Google IO 2023
media:content.media:title: Labs at Google IO 2023

item.title: Getting 25W wireless charging on the Galaxy S26 Ultra is trickier than it should be
item.description: Many Galaxy S26 Ultra users are seeing lower wireless charging speeds than expected.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand

item.title: Not a typo: Mint Mobile is now selling the Google Pixel 10 for only $299 — plus get 50% off a year of unlimited
item.description: Looking for a new phone and a new wireless carrier? Mint Mobile has a deal that will get you both for less than 500 bucks.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 in front of a bush
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 in front of a bush
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 in front of a bush

item.title: There's a Nothing OS update for the Phone 4a that makes it useful and so relaxing
item.description: Nothing just detailed a refined OS update for the Phone 4a series that drastically boosts its real-time alerts and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central

item.title: Forget Prime Day, Best Buy's TechFest sale is LIVE — here are the top 5 Android deals that are making Amazon look bad
item.description: Best Buy just kicked off a sitewide TechFest sale event, showcasing huge discounts on some of our favorite Android devices.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Best Buy logo with Android Central mascot
media:content.media:text: Best Buy logo with Android Central mascot
media:content.media:title: Best Buy logo with Android Central mascot

item.title: A twist like no other: YouTube Shorts lets you 'Reimagine' with Gemini and Veo
item.description: YouTube Shorts has a new AI feature rolling out that's all about "reimaging" what's possible with AI.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: YouTube Shorts logo on a mobile phone
media:content.media:text: YouTube Shorts logo on a mobile phone
media:content.media:title: YouTube Shorts logo on a mobile phone

item.title: Gemini on the Pixel 10 can now handle tasks without you touching your apps
item.description: Google's screen automation feature lets Gemini handle actions like ordering food and calling a cab.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it
media:content.media:text: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it
media:content.media:title: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it

item.title: Your medical history is coming to Fitbit whether you're ready or not
item.description: Fitbit’s finally getting smart by linking your actual medical records and fixing its lying sleep tracker.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Fitbit Personal Health Coach preview Today tab
media:content.media:text: Fitbit Personal Health Coach preview Today tab
media:content.media:title: Fitbit Personal Health Coach preview Today tab

item.title: For the full scope, Fitbit's AI health coach can now read your medical records to help
item.description: Fitbit's in-depth AI health coach is taking its smarts to another level with your medical records.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Fitbit launches its Personal Health Coach
media:content.media:text: Fitbit launches its Personal Health Coach
media:content.media:title: Fitbit launches its Personal Health Coach

item.title: Your next Galaxy phone could ditch Samsung’s own displays to save cash
item.description: Samsung may use cheaper third-party OLEDs for mid-range Galaxy phones to cut costs, but it’s unclear if those savings will actually reach buyers or just boost margins.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background

item.title: Google's Gemini for Home is finally useful enough to not drive you crazy
item.description: Google finally taught Gemini for Home to talk less and work up to 40% faster, delivering smarter alarms and slick automations without all the annoying chatter.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Nest Hub Max
media:content.media:text: Google Nest Hub Max
media:content.media:title: Google Nest Hub Max

item.title: OPPO's Find N6 foldable has a unique multitasking feature that Google needs to steal immediately
item.description: OPPO just launched the Find N6, and the foldable comes with a brand-new multitasking feature called Free-Flow Window that mimics desktop windows.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra proves Samsung is evolving, and its direction makes a lot of sense in the AI age
item.description: Samsung may not be pushing the envelope for specs anymore, but that's not stopping the Galaxy S26 Ultra from being a great phone.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: This feature on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra convinced me to use the phone as my daily driver
item.description: Xiaomi has the best Reading Mode of any manufacturer, and using it on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra has been a revelation.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: Tracfone now offers 5G Home Internet for as little as $39/month — here's the deal
item.description: Tracfone has been providing users with affordable wireless for over two decades, and now it's entering the 5G internet arena.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Tracfone logo with Android Central mascot

item.title: Less fatigue: Boox launches thin Go 10.3 (Gen 2) E-Ink tablet that's easy on the reading eyes
item.description: Boox announced the arrival of the Go 10.3 (Gen 2) E-Ink tablet, which is a massive boon to users looking to read and work.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Boox Go 10.3 (Gen 2) tablet set against a wall, displaying a user's work document/notes.

media:content.media:title: The Boox Go 10.3 (Gen 2) tablet set against a wall, displaying a user's work document/notes.

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra may be dominating the airwaves, but its biggest competitor is $400 cheaper for a limited time
item.description: The Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is the Galaxy S26 Ultra's biggest rival, and it's selling for $899 unlocked at Best Buy's TechFest.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers
media:content.media:text: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers
media:content.media:title: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers

item.title: Spotify on Wear OS just got a big redesign that makes it much easier to use
item.description: Spotify's Wear OS app now offers a more intuitive interface for playback and browsing.

item.title: Personal Intelligence for the masses: Google rolls it out in AI Mode and more across the U.S.

item.title: I used OPPO's Find N6 for two weeks — this creaseless foldable is on another level entirely, and it is the ideal upgrade to the Galaxy Z Fold 7
item.description: With a fully creaseless panel, the OPPO Find N6 is the next evolution in foldable tech.

item.title: All to your liking: Spotify's 'Taste Profile' beta puts you in charge of the music you find
item.description: Your musical tastes can change, and Spotify is giving you the keys to drive that ship wherever it might lead you with this beta.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:text: Spotify's Taste Profile beta begins soon in New Zealand.

item.title: The more I use the Tecno Camon 50 Ultra, the more it feels like an affordable Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Tenco's latest Camon 50 Ultra focuses on performance and AI, offering tons of features and a solid software experience for less than a typical flagship.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:text: Camon 50 Ultra on a wall

item.title: Google is making Chrome on Android tablets and foldables feel more like desktop with the new update
item.description: The update introduces a bookmarks bar below the address bar for easier navigation.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone
media:content.media:text: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone
media:content.media:title: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone

item.title: These three features make the Shargeek 300 the definitive 24,000mAh power bank — it's so good I retired my UGREEN power bank
item.description: Sharge has a new power bank, and it is a beast. The Shargeek 300 has a 24,000mAh battery, two USB-C ports that go up to 140W, and RGB lighting. The best part? Both ports hit 140W simultaneously, allowing you to charge two notebooks at the same time.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central

item.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra display review: Privacy at the cost of everything else
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra comes with one of the most unique smartphone displays we've ever seen, but that also comes with unique problems.

item.title: RedMagic 11 Air Trace Edition is the same great gaming phone in a louder shirt
item.description: RedMagic’s 11 Air Trace Edition keeps its slim design, Snapdragon 8 Elite power, and huge 7,000mAh battery, with a flashier white-and-orange look.

item.title: Samsung apparently started One UI 9 tests, and I'm crying in my lack of One UI 8.5

item.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 could get a bigger battery, and I’m wondering why Samsung waited this long

item.title: I test wireless earbuds for a living, and the Galaxy Buds 4 Pro are hard to beat, especially if you own a Samsung phone

item.title: This forgotten Pixel 10 feature just made my life a little bit easier — Here's how to use it
item.description: Google never really did away with the Rules feature, but it's become smarter on the Pixel 10. You can use it to create automations on your phone.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)

item.title: The Magic 8 Pro Air proves that Apple and Samsung got their thin phones wrong

item.title: This game-changing Galaxy S26 feature just transformed my Netflix binge sessions
item.description: Samsung's Audio Eraser has been upgraded to support third-party apps, lowering background noise and ensuring voices are clear.

item.title: This Galaxy S26 feature is so powerful I might skip carrying a laptop
item.description: Samsung DeX on the Galaxy S26 adds powerful multitasking, allowing up to 20 apps across multiple windows for a true desktop-like experience.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia
